case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER VS. ANA AYALA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOANNE ADDAMS CLAIMS. DEFENDANT ANA AYALA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER  AND TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AYALA, ANA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,125.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
